known_bottlenecks.summary: Unknown intents still cascade through slow brain and tool-chat paths.
Semantic recall still pays synchronous embedding or model-swap costs.
Structured context gathering still does too much work for the live path.
Recording a turn still fans out to too many stores and file writes.
Dashboard polling was reduced in Phase 2, but the operator surfaces are still not event-driven end to end.
butler.py still owns routing, orchestration, speech, and recording in one file.
Configured model chains still contain uninstalled fallbacks and one bad default path.

known_blockers: Model routing docs and setup docs are stale relative to the installed Ollama inventory.
Unknown-intent and question paths still need a lightweight single-call lane before a deeper refactor.
Memory recall and recording still pay too much synchronous work on the live path.
The Ollama CLI inventory command can crash with an MLX-backed macOS exception on this host; the audit script records it as a non-fatal environment issue.
bad_default_paths: butler.py:_unknown_brain_response uses OLLAMA_FALLBACK or OLLAMA_MODEL directly
butler.py:_resolve_followup_text uses OLLAMA_FALLBACK or OLLAMA_MODEL directly

phase_2_verification.test_command: venv/bin/pytest tests/test_architecture_phase2.py tests/test_instant_lane.py tests/test_background_lane.py tests/test_intent_router.py tests/test_dashboard.py tests/test_ollama_client.py tests/test_executor.py tests/test_runtime_telemetry.py tests/test_remaining_items.py tests/test_project_store.py tests/test_agents.py tests/test_butler_pipeline.py -q

test_commands: venv/bin/pytest tests/test_architecture_phase2.py tests/test_instant_lane.py tests/test_background_lane.py tests/test_intent_router.py tests/test_dashboard.py tests/test_ollama_client.py tests/test_executor.py tests/test_runtime_telemetry.py tests/test_remaining_items.py tests/test_project_store.py -q
